historicalDeliveryProvenance.waiverReason: Historical delivery commit 0feeb741c bundles TASK-AAO-0043 deliverables with unrelated framework and skill maintenance; TASK-AAO-0043 scoped files are present and validator evidence is fresh, so closeback must reconcile against the mixed delivery commit instead of inventing a new source commit.

authorityChain.broker: Broker verdicts override Coordinator decisions inside broker-governed conflict domains.
authorityChain.coordinator: Coordinator retains team-local lifecycle authority outside broker-governed conflict domains.

conflictRules: If broker verdict is needs-steward, blocked-cid-conflict, blocked-shared-surface, or historical-delivery-required, Coordinator must stop claim / commit / close progression.
If broker-prescribed routing exceeds task scope, closure authority, or task-card acceptance, Coordinator must escalate to Captain / human.
Coordinator must not silently override broker verdicts inside broker-governed conflict domains.
captainDecision.reason: The task has meaningful atomization or lane risk, so the captain should plan for a medium crew with broader validation support.

implementerSelector.fallbackReason: No fallback needed; TypeScript-heavy paths matched a TypeScript implementer.

stopConditions: scope must stay within declared allowed files
required roles must each be uniquely represented
validators must not report blocking permission conflicts
a broader or stronger lane must stop the plan
captainDecision.escalationReason: Scope spans 12 declared paths, so coordination should be escalated. Scope crosses repo boundaries and should retain a lieutenant coordination boundary. Large script risk indicates the captain should not keep all coordination signals inline. Validator fan-out is 7, which merits lieutenant tracking.

decisionSurface.authorityChain: Broker overrides Coordinator inside broker-governed conflict domains; Coordinator remains local outside them.

teamSummary.decision: The task has meaningful atomization or lane risk, so the captain should plan for a medium crew with broader validation support.
teamSummary.implementationSummary: broker-only selected; no agents are spawned, language=node, atm.node.broker-only-fallback; closure remains governed by command-backed evidence.
